title: BrikByteOS Run Identity v0
description: Canonical run identity contract for BrikByteOS local execution runs.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the run identity contract.

runId.description: Filesystem-safe unique identifier for the run.

startedAt.description: UTC RFC3339 timestamp indicating when orchestration began.

finishedAt.description: UTC RFC3339 timestamp indicating when orchestration finished.

environment.description: Logical release environment only. Not OS environment variables.

executionMode.description: Selection mode used to determine adapter execution.

selectedAdapters.description: Adapter names requested by the user before resolution.

resolvedAdapterOrder.description: Final deterministic adapter order after registry resolution.
